temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with glasses and short, dark hair. He is wearing a light-colored suit jacket over a white collared shirt. The background is dark and indistinct, with a cool, blueish light illuminating his face. He looks slightly down and to his right, speaking with a serious expression. White Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen, and a watermark is visible in the top right corner. The first man speaks in a calm, measured, and slightly condescending tone, as if explaining something complex to someone he considers less intelligent. He says, "Don't put it like that, I should be thanking you for your cooperation." The camera cuts to a wider shot, revealing two men sitting side-by-side in a dimly lit room. The man on the left, previously seen in close-up, is now shown from the chest up. He is wearing a white shirt and a dark tie. The man on the right, who was previously off-screen, is now visible. He wears a denim jacket over a dark t-shirt and looks forward with a somber expression. The background consists of dark walls and what appear to be window blinds. The same white Chinese subtitles are present at the bottom of the frame. The second man responds, his voice filled with a sense of weary confusion and frustration. He sounds like he's trying to understand something that's being presented as overly complicated. He remarks, "Mr. Ni, you speak so obscurely." The camera zooms in for a close-up on the man in the white shirt and tie. He looks forward with a concerned and slightly confused expression, his mouth slightly open as if he is about to speak or has just finished. The lighting remains dark and atmospheric. New white Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen. The first man replies with a low, serious, and definitive voice, stating, "No one understands." The scene is devoid of any background music or significant sound effects, creating a quiet, tense, and focused atmosphere that emphasizes the dialogue and the gravity of the conversation.
